title: The Straw Hats Gather at the Tower — Part 5
description: The crew and allies converge around the Tower of Justice while Robin’s rescue becomes a declaration against the World Government.
scene: Across pages 22, 23, this part follows Luffy, Franky, Fukurou, Zoro, Nami. The crew and allies converge around the Tower of Justice while Robin’s rescue becomes a declaration against the World Government.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh, our enemy is just strawhat himself?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I guess he's lost his touch

summary: The crew and allies converge around the Tower of Justice while Robin’s rescue becomes a declaration against the World Government.
